tagline: Expert Pool & Landscaping Services in Vistancia

hero.headline: Vistancia's Most Trusted Pool & Yard Pros
hero.subheadline: Brian Beckman and his crew keep Peoria pools crystal-clear and yards pristine -- even in 115-degree heat. 51 five-star reviews and counting because we treat every home like our own.
checkmarks: Weekly email reports after every visit
Emergency service when you need it most

services.headline: Pool & Landscape Services Built for Arizona Living
services.subtitle: From weekly pool care to full landscape transformations, we handle everything so you can enjoy your outdoor space worry-free.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Chemical balancing, skimming, filter cleaning, and full equipment checks every week. Your pool stays swim-ready year-round, no matter the heat.

cards.title: Pool Repair
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, plumbing -- Brian solves stubborn problems other companies give up on. Fast diagnosis, lasting fixes.

cards.title: Weekly Landscaping Care
cards.description: Mowing, edging, trimming, weed removal, plant health checks, and full debris cleanup. Your yard stays HOA-ready without lifting a finger.

cards.title: Hardscaping & Installation
cards.description: Patios, walkways, retaining walls, and desert-friendly plantings designed to thrive in Arizona's climate and elevate your curb appeal.

cards.title: Irrigation Install & Repair
cards.description: Sprinkler and drip system installation plus emergency repairs. We keep your landscape healthy and your water bill low.

cards.title: Tree Trimming
cards.description: Professional trimming of mesquite and other Arizona trees. We keep branches safe, healthy, and your property looking sharp.

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Visit
steps.description: Call or fill out our form. We'll set up a complimentary first visit to walk your property and understand exactly what you need.

steps.title: Get a Straightforward Plan
steps.description: Brian personally reviews your pool and yard, then provides an honest recommendation and clear pricing -- no upsells, no surprises.

steps.title: Enjoy a Perfect Backyard
steps.description: We handle everything on a reliable weekly schedule and send you a detailed email after every single visit so you always know what was done.

about.label: About Pool & Landscaping of Vistancia
about.headline: Owner-Operated. Community-Focused. Built on Trust.
about.description: Brian Beckman founded Pool & Landscaping of Vistancia with one goal: deliver honest, reliable service that Vistancia homeowners can count on week after week. Every visit ends with a detailed email recap, and our neighbor nomination program means your friends and neighbors can try us free. From pool chemistry to landscape design, Brian and his team bring hands-on expertise and genuine pride in every yard they touch.

features.title: Email Reports After Every Visit
features.description: You'll receive a detailed email recap after every single service visit, so you always know exactly what was done at your property.

features.title: Free First Visit -- Neighbor Nominations
features.description: Our neighbor nomination program lets your friends and neighbors try us with a complimentary first visit -- no strings attached.

features.title: BBB Accredited & Fully Licensed
features.description: We're a BBB Accredited Business, fully licensed and insured in Arizona. Your property is always in professional, protected hands.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every plan is customized to your property. Call us for a free walkthrough and honest quote -- you'll know exactly what you're paying for before we start.

guarantee.headline: Our Promise to You
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service visit, we'll come back and make it right at no extra charge. Brian personally stands behind every job because his name is on the business -- and your trust matters more than anything.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Vistancia, Peoria, Surprise, Glendale, and North Phoenix, Arizona -- primarily ZIP codes 85382 and 85383. If you're nearby, give us a call and we'll let you know.

faqs.question: What's included in weekly pool maintenance?
faqs.answer: Every weekly visit includes chemical testing and balancing, surface skimming, brushing, vacuuming, filter inspection and cleaning, and a full equipment check. After each visit, you'll receive a detailed email report of everything we did.

faqs.question: How does the neighbor nomination program work?
faqs.answer: If you know someone who could use our services, nominate them and they'll receive a complimentary first visit -- no strings attached. It's our way of building trust in the Vistancia community one neighbor at a time.

faqs.question: Do you handle emergency repairs?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. If your pool equipment fails or your irrigation system has a sudden leak, call us right away. We offer emergency service availability to get things fixed fast before further damage occurs.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. Pool & Landscaping of Vistancia is fully licensed and insured in Arizona and is a BBB Accredited Business. You can trust that your property is in professional, protected hands.

testimonials.name: Joe Jacobs
testimonials.text: Brian Beckman is the best pool company we have ever used in our 30 years as a pool owner. Brian is dependable and very knowledgeable.

testimonials.name: Ken Cruickshank
testimonials.text: Brian was able to solve a stubborn problem regarding air getting into our pool system that others could not resolve. Extremely easy to work with.

testimonials.name: Kat Israel
testimonials.text: Brian, Zack and the team have been amazing. They are hard working, timely, and always go above and beyond. Their integrity and professionalism are top notch.

contact.headline: Ready for a Backyard You'll Love?
contact.subtitle: Reach out today for a free property walkthrough. No pressure, no upsells -- just an honest plan to keep your pool and yard looking their best.
benefits: Detailed email recap after every service

footer.description: Pool & Landscaping of Vistancia delivers honest, reliable pool and landscaping services to homeowners across the Vistancia community and greater Peoria area. Owner-operated by Brian Beckman.
footer.service_area: Proudly serving Vistancia, Peoria, Surprise, Glendale, and North Phoenix, AZ
